zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Powell II於1616年5月16日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可科華士 希斯時，他的父親Thomas Powell I32歲，母親Elizabeth Parsons28歲。他於1637年與Priscilla Whitson在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州。他去世於1681年10月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年65歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Powell II于1616年5月16日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可科華士 希斯时，他的父亲Thomas Powell I32岁，母亲Elizabeth Parsons28岁。他于1637年与Priscilla Whitson在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文劍橋大學默里 哈文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州。他去世于1681年10月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年65岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Powell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Hywel ‘son of Hywel’, a personal name meaning ‘eminent’ (see Howell ).
Irish: mainly of Welsh origin as in 1 above, but sometimes a surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phóil ‘son of the servant of Saint Paul’ (see Guilfoyle ).
English: variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .

variants.name: Powel
meanings: North German: from a form of the personal name   Paul  .

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Welsh and English: in the Welsh border counties, from the Welsh male personal name Hywel ‘eminent’, popular since the Middle Ages particularly in honor of the great 10th-century law-giving Welsh king. The name may also arise from the Breton personal name Houuel, Huwel, Huwal, Howael, cognate with the Welsh name. Bretons were especially numerous in the eastern counties of England. See Powell .
English: perhaps from a Middle English personal name Huwel (spelled Howel), a shortening of Huwelot or Huelin (see Hewlett and Huling ), both pet forms of Middle English Huw (see Hugh ).
English: habitational name from Howell (Lincolnshire), from an uncertain initial element + Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’.

variants.name: Powles
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Powells, itself a variant of Powell , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Powell II was born on 16 May 1616, in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Powell I, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Parsons, was 28. He married Priscilla Whitson in 1637, in New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He immigrated to Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. He died on 3 October 1681, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65, and was buried in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Powell II est né le 16 mai 1616, à Forest Heath, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Powell I, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Parsons, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Priscilla Whitson en 1637, à New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il a immigré au Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. Il est décédé le 3 octobre 1681, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Powell II am 16. Mai 1616 in Forest Heath, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Powell I 32 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Parsons 28. Er hat 1637 in New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Priscilla Whitson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er ist 1635 nach Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb am 3. Oktober 1681 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Powell II è nato il il 16 maggio 1616 nel Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Powell I, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Parsons, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Priscilla Whitson nel 1637, nel New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Immigrato nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Morì il 3 ottobre 1681, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Powell IIが1616年5月16日にイギリスイギリススフォルクフォーエスト ヒースで生まれた時，父Thomas Powell Iは32歳，母Elizabeth Parsonsは28歳であった。1637年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニュー ヘイベンでPriscilla Whitsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州に移住した。彼は1681年10月3日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで65歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Powell II(이)가 1616년 5월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 포레스트 히스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Powell I(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Parsons(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1637년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴 하븐에서 Priscilla Whitson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1681년 10월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Powell II nasceu em 16 de maio de 1616, em Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Powell I, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Parsons, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Priscilla Whitson em 1637, em New Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Conecticute, British Colonial America em 1635. Ele faleceu em 3 de outubro de 1681, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Powell II родился 16 мая 1616 г. в местности форест хит, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Powell I было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Parsons, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Priscilla Whitson в 1637 г. в местности ню хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он иммигрировал в Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. Он умер 3 октября 1681 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Powell II nació el 16 de mayo de 1616, en Forest Heath, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Powell I, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Parsons, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Priscilla Whitson en 1637, en New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Inmigró a Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Murió el 3 de octubre de 1681, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
